items.title: Iran suspends talks with US over Israeli attacks in Lebanon — Araghchi: 'ceasefire on all fronts, violation on one = violation on all'
Trump insists talks at 'rapid pace' — contradicts Iran suspension; posts on Truth Social after heated Netanyahu call
Trump calls Netanyahu 'f**king crazy' — demands Beirut strike cancellation; 'Everybody hates you now. Everybody hates Israel'
Trump announces Lebanon ceasefire — Netanyahu agrees to stop Dahieh strikes, Hezbollah agrees 'all shooting will stop'
Netanyahu contradicts ceasefire — IDF will keep striking southern Lebanon 'as planned'; Katz denies ceasefire exists
CENTCOM intercepts 5 Iranian missiles — 2 at Kuwait, 3 at Bahrain; IRGC says response to Qeshm strikes; no casualties
CENTCOM strikes Qeshm Island drone ground control station — response to IRGC shootdown of US MQ-1 drone
IDF soldier killed at Beaufort Castle — Staff Sgt. Tzarfati, 20, Hezbollah FPV drone at Yohmor; 3 wounded
Rubio Senate testimony — Iran must agree to 'severe and long-term' nuclear limits; 30-60-90 day timeline; Iran showing new flexibility
Iran threatens Bab el-Mandeb closure — IRGC threatens both Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb; Hormuz 'effectively closed' since May 4
Oil prices: Brent +5% to ~$95 on Iran suspension news, then slips to ~$91; WTI ~$92
Israel-Lebanon Round 4 talks begin at State Department — Needham/Holler lead US side; Jun 2-3
Ghalibaf tells Berri Iran may retaliate if Israeli Lebanon attacks continue — most explicit escalatory signal since late May
Iran reviewing deal, no communication for days — Baghaei: 'no negotiations on nuclear details at this stage'
